system.description: Make port in every Nation in Théah.
system.trigger: Make port in every Nation in Théah.
system.reward: When you make port in a Théan city, any Hero can spend a Raise or a Hero Point: whatever authority exists in the port (a harbor master, customs officer, admiral) knows your Ship and treats you relatively well until you give them a reason not to. They won't let you break the law, but they might let you bend it.

system.description: Convince a hostile ship's Crew to join you, through negotiation, coercion or intimidation.
system.trigger: Convince a hostile ship's Crew to join you, through negotiation, coercion or intimidation.

system.reward: Each Hero gains one of the following Advantages of their choice: Able Drinker, Cast-Iron Stomach or Sea Legs.
The first time each round any of your Crew Squads inflicts Wounds on an enemy while at sea, that enemy takes one additional Wound.
The first time each round your Ship fires her cannons at an enemy, that enemy Ship takes an additional Hit.

name: Gold Drives a Man to Dream

system.description: Earn 10 Wealth from selling Cargo in one Voyage.
system.trigger: Earn 10 Wealth from selling Cargo in one Voyage.
system.reward: You may carry one additional Cargo on your Ship.

system.description: Escape a city with the authorities on your heels.
system.trigger: Escape a city with the authorities on your heels.
system.reward: Your Ship's Crew learns how to leave port in a hurry. Your Ship can return to full complement after only 12 hours in port, rather than 24.

name: How Long Can You Hold Your Breath?

system.description: Dive a shipwreck, a reef or an underwater cave and retrieve something valuable.
system.trigger: Dive a shipwreck, a reef or an underwater cave and retrieve something valuable.
system.reward: Gain 1 Bonus Die for any Risks involving swimming, navigating underwater or holding your breath.

system.description: Make port in a city outside of Théah.
system.trigger: Make port in a city outside of Théah.
system.reward: Gain 1 Bonus Die in any social Risk against an NPC whose native language is one from outside of Théah.

system.description: Rescue a marooned NPC (lost at sea, on a deserted island, etc.).
system.trigger: Rescue a marooned NPC (lost at sea, on a deserted island, etc.).
system.reward: Add one Strength to your Ship's total Crew.

system.description: Lead your Crew in the singing of a sea shanty during shore leave at a seedy port tavern.
system.trigger: Lead your Crew in the singing of a sea shanty during shore leave at a seedy port tavern.
system.reward: Any Hero can spend a Hero Point to return one of your Crew Squads back to full Strength. Only one Hero can activate this benefit per game session.

system.description: Transport an NPC Fate Witch from one port to another.
system.trigger: Transport an NPC Fate Witch from one port to another.
system.reward: At the beginning of each game session, each Hero rolls one die. Whichever Hero rolls highest begins play with an additional Hero Point. A tie for highest grants no Hero the extra point.

system.description: Save the crew of a sinking ship, when things look their bleakest (fierce storm, sea monster attack, etc.).
system.trigger: Save the crew of a sinking ship, when things look their bleakest (fierce storm, sea monster attack, etc.).
system.reward: The Captain and Crew of that Ship are now allies and can be relied upon for friendly assistance, earning all Heroes the Connections Advantage with that ship and her Crew.
The first time each round you spend a Raise to reduce the Strength of a Pirate Brute Squad, you reduce their Strength by 1 more than you would have normally.

system.description: Transport a member of Théan royalty from one port to another.
system.trigger: Transport a member of Théan royalty from one port to another.
system.reward: Any NPC with noble blood treats you a little better. Gain one Bonus Die for any social Risks involving noble characters.
Add 10 additional Wealth to your Ship's Treasury.

system.description: Your Ship was Crippled, you surrendered or you were successfully robbed by pirates.
system.trigger: Your Ship was Crippled, you surrendered or you were successfully robbed by pirates.
system.reward: The first time any Hero rolls a Risk versus a Pirate in a game session, all Heroes gain a Hero Point.
